id.description: A comma-separated list of IP location database configurations.

master_timeout.description: The period to wait for a connection to the master node. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error. A value of `-1` indicates that the request should never time out.

timeout.description: The period to wait for a response. If no response is received before the timeout expires, the request fails and returns an error. A value of `-1` indicates that the request should never time out.
